action_set_definitions.name: get_application_info
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the core details of a loan application, including the applicant company name, requested loan amount, and the name of the lead investor.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the loan application (e.g., APP-5520).

action_set_definitions.name: get_company_financials
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the financial performance metrics for the company associated with the application, including MRR, Gross Margin, Burn Rate, current cash balance, and equity funding history.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the loan application.

action_set_definitions.name: get_investor_tier
action_set_definitions.description: Checks the internal database to determine the tier/ranking of a specific venture capital firm.

investor_name.description: The name of the lead investor firm.

action_set_definitions.name: get_risk_policy_thresholds
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the underwriting formulas and thresholds, such as the MRR multiplier or equity percentage used to calculate max loan size.

action_set_definitions.name: update_application_status
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the status and approved amount of a loan application in the registry.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the loan application.

status.description: The new status of the application.

action_set_definitions.name: record_covenant
action_set_definitions.description: Logs a mandatory legal or financial covenant against a specific loan application for compliance and tracking.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the loan application.

covenant_name.description: The name of the covenant (e.g., 'Minimum Liquidity').

value_description.description: The specific value or calculation result associated with the covenant (e.g., '$600,000').

state_description.application_registry: A collection of all loan applications currently in the system, including applicant personal data, requested amounts, and current status.
state_description.credit_bureau_records: A database of credit scores and historical payment data indexed by applicant identifier.
state_description.available_capital: The total amount of currency available in the bank's reserve for lending.
state_description.risk_policy_thresholds: Configurable parameters for risk assessment, such as minimum acceptable credit score or maximum debt-to-income ratio.
state_description.audit_log: A record of actions taken by the Agent (e.g., credit pulls, status changes) for compliance tracking.

audit_log.details: CloudScale AI submitted venture debt request.
